title: niphobolus samarensis
intro: Niphobolus samarensis, also known as the Samarensis fern or Polypodium samarensis, is a type of fern native to the Philippines. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Niphobolus samarensis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. Niphobolus samarensis is typically prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, or as a tincture by soaking the plant in alcohol, to utilize its medicinal properties.
